name: keywords_any-substring
note: 'alpha' is found inside 'alphabet', so keywords_any matches on substrings, not whole words.

name: keywords_any-case-fold
note: 'ALPHA' matches the lowercase keyword 'alpha': keyword matching is case-insensitive.

name: keywords_all-both-present
note: Both 'charlie' and 'delta' are present, so keywords_all matches.

name: keywords_all-one-missing-no-match
note: Only 'charlie' is present; keywords_all needs every keyword, so it fails and falls through to default.

name: regex-no-match
note: 'echo-x' has no digit after 'echo-', so it does not match 'echo-[0-9]+' and falls through to default.

name: any-one-child-matches
note: 'golf' matches one branch; an any needs only one child to match.

name: all-both-children-match
note: Both 'hotel' and 'india' match, so the all matches.

name: all-one-child-no-match
note: 'india' is missing, so the all fails and falls through to default.

name: not-child-absent-matches
note: 'kilo' is absent so not(kilo) is true; together with 'juliett' the rule matches.

name: not-child-present-no-match
note: 'kilo' is present so not(kilo) is false; the rule fails and falls through to default.

name: implicit-all-both-keys
note: A leaf with two keys (keywords_any + max_chars) requires both to hold; both do, so it matches.
